name: @harness/task-queue
description: ISSUE-048 — the task_queue permanent-audit-record substrate (C5 QUE — FR-5.QUE.001–006). The full typed §6 row schema (incl. net-new originating_user_id + action_payload, NO client_slug per OD-096), a fixed status state machine over task_status (with the C5-defined/C6-set `flagged` quarantine hold distinct from awaiting_approval), config-tunable priority dequeue (lower = higher), the approval-blocking transition (requires_approval → awaiting_approval; record approved_by/at) with staleness escalation onto ISSUE-011's event_log (alert+badge seam; never auto-approve/abandon), and full per-attempt error history (never collapsed). Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL (results/proposed-migration-0008_task_queue.sql) — NOT run live (the REVOKE-delete + state-machine live proof is owed at the Stage-3 checkpoint).
